title: Hello World
body:
Welcome to GitCMS

This is your first blog post, managed entirely through GitHub. Every edit you make here becomes a commit in your repository.

Try editing this post to see how the rich text editor works. You can use bold, italic, headings, lists, and more.

  • Version-controlled content
  • Rich text editing
  • GitHub-native workflow
excerpt: Your first blog post managed through GitCMS
author: aniJani
